scope: Repair the protected-evidence QoL trio so future runs start from automation memory, target real backend permission/evidence work, and handle detached-HEAD plus tracker closeout consistently.

automation_efficiency.notes: Prompt repair stays within the existing 30-start/day cadence and should improve yield by reducing re-scoping and closeout drift in the protected-evidence lane.
